notes: Aligned to the Ubuntu CI runner — the machine this gate actually runs on. The prior baseline was captured on a local darwin-arm64 Apple M-series machine (~122 ms), which structurally failed every PR by ~50% against Linux runner times (a constant additive offset on every command, including hook-free --version). FAIL_THRESHOLD stays 0.5 (50%) to absorb runner variance.
Aligned to the Ubuntu CI runner. See aidd --version note.
Aligned to the Ubuntu CI runner. status stays near --version/--help — the update-check hot path is read-only and offline (cache read only, no network block).
